results.releaseNotes: Improved localization, Settings, widget refresh timing, and photo loading performance.
results.description:
PhotoDay is a simple photo journal for saving one meaningful photo for each day.

Use it for everyday memories, a baby photo diary, pet photos, travel notes, fitness progress, creative work, or any small change you want to remember. PhotoDay sets a picked photo for each day so your calendar starts filling naturally, without editing tools getting in the way.

Open a date to revisit that day. You can keep the picked photo, or change it later by selecting another photo or swiping through the day's photos. Picked photos appear on your calendar, and the widget can show a selected memory at a glance.

No account is required. Your photos are read from the photo library on your device, and picked photo references are stored locally for the app and widget.

results.releaseNotes:
Added Results tab
Added group standings
Moved Settings to the top-right gear button
Improved widget display
results.description:
Kickoff Bell 2026 helps you follow the 2026 football schedule, kickoff times, local alerts, team facts, team rankings and squad lists.

Check matches by date, team and stadium, and compare kickoff times in your time zone with venue local time. Add matches to your Watch List and use local reminders before kickoff.

Team facts include team ranking, confederation, group, head coach and squad lists for 48 teams, 1248 players and 48 head coaches based on public tournament data.

Stadium details include city and country, with quick links to open the location in Apple Maps or Google Maps.

Kickoff Bell Plus is a one-time purchase that unlocks unlimited favorite matches, multiple favorite teams, Favorite Calendar, local match notes and multiple reminder timings. Favorite-team matches also feed the Watch List, widgets and reminders.

Kickoff Bell 2026 does not provide live scores, live match tracking, knockout brackets, news, video highlights, broadcast listings, tickets, hotels, transport or travel booking.

This app is an independent 2026 football schedule and kickoff reminder utility. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any tournament organizer.

results.releaseNotes: Version 1.2.0 adds voice input, Home Screen widget improvements, ZEC common Settings, localization updates, and larger text presets for iPad-friendly display.
results.description:
Big Text Note is a simple local note app for showing one memo in large, easy-to-read text.

Speak a note with voice input, type directly, or edit the text by hand. Voice input converts speech into text, then you choose whether to append the result to your note or replace the current note. This app does not save audio files. Only text you apply to the note is saved locally.

Use Show mode when you want the note to act like a clear message board. Choose Normal, Large, or Huge text presets, fine-tune the size, and set text and background colors in Settings. The larger sizes are especially useful on iPad.

Add the Home Screen widget to keep your current note visible at a glance. The widget reads the same note, text size, and colors as the app through private App Group storage.

No account is required. There are no ads, no tracking, and no server sync.

Never wonder “Did I do the laundry?” again.

Laundry Tap shows you exactly how long it’s been since your last wash — and when it’s time to do it again.

No lists. No clutter. Just one tap.

■ See your laundry status instantly
Fresh, OK, or Time to wash — your current state is clear at a glance.

■ One-tap reset
Did the laundry? Just tap once and reset your status to fresh.

■ Stay on track without thinking
Set a reminder and never let laundry pile up again.

■ Simple by design
No categories. No complex setup. Just what you need.

Laundry Tap turns a small daily stress into a simple habit.

results.releaseNotes: Added Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets. You can now check today's study time, sessions, level, and EXP more easily. This update also improves localized text and adds common settings links.
results.description:
Study Buddy Timer is a simple focus timer for tracking your study time.

Start a study session with one tap, stop when you are done, and keep track of your daily study time, sessions, EXP, and level progress.

You can also check your study progress from Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets, so your daily study time is always easy to see.

Features:
- One-tap study timer
- Daily study time tracking
- Study session count
- EXP and level progress
- Home Screen widgets
- Lock Screen widgets
- Simple stats screen
- Share and feedback links
- Data stored on your device

It is not a complex task manager. It is a lightweight study timer for people who want to start studying and keep going.

results.releaseNotes:
Improved UI clarity and removed confusing notification count.
Minor layout adjustments for a cleaner experience.
results.description:
Track your medication in seconds.

PillTap is a simple medication tracker designed for one thing:
helping you take your pills, without overthinking.

Morning. Noon. Night. Bedtime.
Just tap when you take it.

Set reminders, stay consistent, and move on with your day.

No clutter.
No complicated setup.
Just a clean, fast way to stay on track.

Key features:
- One-tap medication tracking
- Simple 4-time daily schedule
- Daily reminders for each dose
- Clean and minimal interface
- Quick daily history view

Perfect for daily medication, supplements, and routines.

Take it. Done.

results.releaseNotes: Added app UI localization and App Store metadata drafts for English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, German, French, and Spanish. URL cleanup remains local-only with no account, no tracking, and no history.
results.description:
CleanURL Tap is a simple URL cleaner for links you copy, save, open, or share. Paste a URL and remove common tracking parameters such as campaign tags, ad click IDs, affiliate tags, referral tags, social sharing noise, and platform noise. For very noisy links, you can enable an optional mode that removes everything after `?`.
Everything works locally on your device. CleanURL Tap does not require an account, does not track you, does not keep URL history, and does not upload URLs for cleanup. It is built to be small, fast, and private.

A simple hydration tracker designed for speed.

Log your water in just one tap — directly from your Lock Screen or Home Screen widget.

No clutter. No setup. Just tap and go.

• One-tap water logging
• Lock Screen & Home Screen widgets
• Visual hydration status based on time since your last drink
• Minimal calendar to track your daily habit

Your screen shows how hydrated you are.
Drink, tap, and stay on track.

Built for simplicity. Designed for consistency.

results.releaseNotes:
Improved widget display, reminder behavior, and overall readability.

- Added clearer widget information
- Improved reminder behavior when today is already done
- Improved date readability
- Refined small UI details for a smoother daily experience
results.description:
DoneToday helps you focus on what you actually did today.

No complex task lists. No planning overload.
Just one simple action — tap once and you're done.

Track your day with a single tap and build a habit that sticks.

results.releaseNotes: Added home screen widget support, group reminders, and Japanese and English localization.
results.description:
Packed is a simple packing checklist for the things you need to bring today.

Create a group for a trip, school bag, gym visit, hospital stay, your child's daily items, or any repeat routine. Add the items once, then check what is ready before you leave.

Features:
- Manage packing groups and item lists
- Check today's packed state at a glance
- Mark a whole group packed in one tap
- Set reminder days and times per group
- See today's progress in a widget
- No account required
- No external server sync

Packed keeps the workflow light: open the app, check the list, and leave with fewer forgotten items.

results.releaseNotes: This update adds localized app text, localized speech recognition setup, and clearer URL opening behavior.
results.description:
PinLog is a simple place to save text and links you do not want to lose.

Save a note, paste from the clipboard, import a file, or send content from another app through the share sheet. PinLog keeps the item clean and ready, then helps you return to it later from the app or Home Screen widget.

Use it for launch notes, links to read, product ideas, checklist fragments, reminders, and small pieces of text that are useful but easy to forget.

Features:
- Save text and links quickly
- Dictate notes with voice input
- Import text, Markdown, and JSON files
- Save from other apps with the share extension
- Open URL pins in the browser
- Tap links inside notes from the detail view
- Use a widget to resurface saved items
- Copy, edit, share, or delete saved pins

PinLog is intentionally small: no feeds, no folders to manage, and no complicated note system. It is built for capturing something now and acting on it later.

Body Rhythm Log is a simple and private way to track your personal patterns.

No streaks. No pressure. Just log and move on.

• Log events with a single tap
• View your history in a clean calendar
• Stay aware of your own rhythm over time
• Minimal design, no distractions
• Fully private, no accounts required

This app is designed for quiet, personal use.
No goals, no pressure—just your rhythm.

results.releaseNotes: A streamlined one-screen mood journal with quick past-day editing, a compact month view, and flexible daily reminder settings.
results.description:
Track your day in one tap.

TapLog is a simple mood tracker designed for speed and clarity.
No typing. No thinking. Just tap.

Log how you feel in seconds and look back on your days with a clean, minimal calendar.

Features:
- One-tap mood logging
- Simple and intuitive interface
- Calendar view of your mood history
- No account required

Stay aware. Stay consistent.

results.releaseNotes:
This update improves PoopTap Plus purchase reliability and paywall behavior.

- Improved in-app purchase product loading
- Added a retry option when product information is temporarily unavailable
- Improved purchase button state handling
- Improved restore and paywall reliability
- Minor stability improvements
results.description:
PoopTap is a simple and playful poop logging app.

Record your daily bowel movements with one tap, review your history on a calendar, and watch your poop buddy grow as you keep logging.

Features:
- One-tap poop logging
- Daily log history
- Calendar view
- Recent logs
- Character evolution
- Forms and skins
- Achievements
- Shareable progress cards
- Optional PoopTap Plus upgrade

PoopTap Plus includes premium forms, premium share cards, extra achievements, and iCloud Backup & Restore.

Your logs are stored on your device. If you delete the app, your local logs may be deleted. With iCloud Backup, Plus users can keep a backup of their logs and restore them after reinstalling.

PoopTap is for personal logging and entertainment only. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

Today Ready helps you quickly decide what to do today based on the weather.

Instead of showing too much forecast detail, it gives you simple cards for everyday choices:

- Umbrella
- Laundry
- Outfit
- Park

Open the app or check the widget to see compact weather-based suggestions for your day.

Today Ready keeps things simple. It does not require an account, does not show ads, and does not track you.

Weather data may be provided through Apple Weather/WeatherKit or Open-Meteo depending on availability.

Sheep to Sleep is a tiny bedtime app that gently counts sheep for you.

Open the app, tap Start, dim the screen, and let a calm voice count sheep with quiet pauses between each one.

It is designed for bedtime, naps, and quiet moments when you want a simple audio routine without screens, games, ads, or distractions.

Features:
• Gentle sheep counting
• English and Japanese
• Calm voice playback
• Adjustable pause length
• Sleep timer
• Dark, simple screen
• No account
• No ads
• No tracking
• No internet connection required

Just simple sheep counting for a quieter rest.

UndoCam turns short videos into simple rewind clips.

Choose a video under 15 seconds, reverse it, then save or share. It is made for quick everyday clips, funny moments, and social posts.

Videos are processed on your device. No account, no upload, no complicated editing.

Access Lens helps you view everyday scenes and photos through simplified visual awareness filters. Use the live camera preview or choose a photo, then try blur, low contrast, cataract-style, tunnel vision, and central blind spot effects to notice how text, signs, layouts, and visual details can become harder to read.

The app is designed for awareness, education, and accessibility checks. It is not a medical diagnosis app, does not provide medical advice, and does not accurately reproduce any visual condition. The filters are simplified simulations for learning and discussion.

Features:

- Live camera preview
- Photo import from the system photo picker
- Blur, cataract-style, tunnel, central spot, and low contrast filters
- Adjustable filter intensity
- Normal / Filtered comparison
- Save filtered images to Photos only when you choose
- Share filtered images with the system share sheet
- Local processing on device

Access Lens does not collect personal data, does not use analytics or advertising SDKs, and does not upload images to external servers.

BaroNote is a simple barometer and personal log.

Check the current air pressure, see whether it is rising, steady, or falling, and save a quick private note about your mood and condition.

Features:

- Current air pressure display using the iPhone pressure sensor when available
- Rising, steady, and falling trend display
- Mood and condition logs
- Symptom tags and optional notes
- History list
- hPa, mb, inHg, and mmHg units
- Home Screen widgets
- Lock Screen accessory widgets on supported iOS versions
- Local-only storage
- No account, tracking, ads, or server upload

BaroNote is for personal logging only and does not provide medical advice.

Pick three simple English words and hear a silly rhythmic combo.

Silly Word Beat is a playful word app for kids and families. Choose a sound group, pick three words, and listen as the app reads funny textbook-style sentences with a steady beat.

Pop words go Boom.
Tap words go Ta-da.
Click words go Click.

It is simple, local, and easy to play. There are no accounts, no ads, no tracking, and no online features. Just word play, rhythm, and silly sounds.

Features:
- Pick from Pop, Tap, and Click word groups
- Make funny English word combos
- Hear textbook-style voice reading
- Shuffle new combos
- Read again anytime
- Simple one-screen play

Caffeine Tap is a simple caffeine tracker built for quick daily logging.

Tap coffee, tea, espresso, cola, or energy drinks to record your caffeine intake. See your daily total, your remaining amount, and a simple cutoff reminder for later in the day.

No account. No complicated charts. Just a lightweight caffeine log for everyday use.

Features:

- One tap caffeine logging
- Daily caffeine total
- Remaining caffeine amount
- Custom caffeine amount
- Small Home Screen Widget
- Cutoff reminder
- Personal daily limit
- Local storage only

Caffeine amounts are estimates and may vary by brand, size, and brewing method. Caffeine Tap is for personal tracking only and does not provide medical advice.

Hong Kong Phrase Card is a practical travel phrase card app for Japanese travelers visiting Hong Kong.

Search phrases in Japanese, English, or Cantonese/Traditional Chinese, then show large Traditional Chinese text to local people. When visual communication is not enough, you can play speech using the iPhone text-to-speech system.

The app includes 160 offline phrases for common travel situations such as airports, hotels, transportation, taxis, trains, restaurants, cafes, shopping, convenience stores, sightseeing, payment, illness, allergies, trouble, and emergencies. It is designed mainly for Hong Kong travel and may also help in places where Cantonese or Traditional Chinese is useful.

Features:

- Search in Japanese, English, and Cantonese/Traditional Chinese
- 160 offline travel phrases
- Large Traditional Chinese Show mode
- English text shown together
- Katakana pronunciation guides for Japanese travelers
- Speech playback support
- Favorites
- Category lists ordered by practical usefulness rank
- Works offline
- No account and no external translation API

Use it when you need a quick phrase that is easier to show than to type into a live translation app.

Note: This app is intended to support simple travel communication. For emergencies, medical, legal, immigration, or official matters, please confirm with local authorities or qualified professionals.

年齢プロフィールは、家族や親族の生年月日をまとめて管理できる日本向けのプロフィール帳アプリです。

父母、祖父母、子ども、親族などのプロフィールを保存して、満年齢、数え年、生年月日の和暦、今年の和暦、干支、星座、一般的な厄年の目安、長寿祝いをひと目で確認できます。

誕生日や長寿祝いの通知設定にも対応。還暦、古希、喜寿など、家族行事の確認にも使えます。

西暦・和暦変換ツールでは、明治、大正、昭和、平成、令和の年月日を変換できます。履歴書、申請書、役所手続きなどで和暦を確認したいときにも便利です。

無料版ではプロフィールを2件まで保存できます。Plusを購入すると、プロフィール保存数が無制限になります。

主な機能:
- 家族・親族プロフィールの保存
- 満年齢、数え年、生年月日の和暦を表示
- 干支、星座、血液型、メモの保存
- 一般的な厄年の目安を表示
- 長寿祝いの目安を表示
- 誕生日通知、長寿祝い通知
- 西暦・和暦変換
- 端末内保存

このアプリは占い、運勢、災厄、健康効果などを断定するものではありません。厄年や長寿祝いは、一般的な目安として表示しています。

AssetCurve is a local, simple compound-growth simulator for creating rough estimates from your own inputs.

Use Future Value mode to estimate a possible future asset amount from an initial amount, monthly contribution, expected annual return, and number of years. Use Goal Backsolve mode to estimate the monthly contribution that would be needed for a target amount under the same simplified assumptions.

The app shows future value, total contributions, estimated growth, a monthly chart, and a yearly projection. USD is the default unit, with JPY and EUR also available.

AssetCurve is not investment advice and does not recommend any investment. Results are approximate simulations only and do not guarantee future outcomes. Taxes, fees, currency changes, market volatility, asset allocation, correlation, and other real-world factors are not included.

No account, cloud sync, external API, or network connection is required.
